landing.headline: Private room card battles for friends.

room.title: Room {code}
room.leaveHint: Leave the room and clear your saved name

lobby.deckBoxesHint: Minimum for this lobby: {count}. One box contains 108 cards.
lobby.jumpInHint: Players may play an exact matching card out of turn.
lobby.stackingHint: Draw cards can be stacked into one total penalty.
lobby.waitingHost: Waiting for the host to start...
lobby.allowMidGameJoinHint: Late users can watch now and take a seat when the next round starts.

board.readOnlyView: You can watch the table, log, and scores, but cannot take player actions.

log.joinedWaiting: {name} is waiting for the next round.
log.autoPlay: {name} is on auto play until they reconnect.
log.timedOut: {name} timed out and drew one card.
log.lostChallenge: {name} lost the challenge and drew six.
log.passedEmpty: {name} passed — no cards left to draw.
log.deckExhausted: The draw pile ran out of cards.

errors.notYourTurn: Not your turn yet — hang tight!
errors.invalidCard: That card can't be played right now.
errors.drawnCardOnly: You can only play the card you just drew.
errors.alreadyDrew: You already drew a card this turn.
errors.colorRequired: Pick a color for the Wild card first.
errors.catchFailed: Too late — they can't be caught now.
errors.notHost: Only the host can do that.
errors.maxPlayersTooLow: Max players can't be lower than the current room size.
errors.deckBoxesTooLow: Card boxes can't be lower than the current lobby minimum.
errors.oneCallPending: One call is resolving — wait a moment.
errors.playerNotFound: You are watching this room and cannot take player actions.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests — wait a moment and try again.

roundEnd.waitingHost: Waiting for the host to start the next round...
roundEnd.waitingPlayer: You will join as a player when the host starts the next round.
roundEnd.spectatorOnly: This room is spectator-only for you.

rules.title: How to play CongCard
rules.goalBody: Empty your hand first. The round winner scores points from cards left in every other hand.
rules.goalLastStandBody: Empty your hand to finish and leave the active turn order. The round continues until only one player remains.
rules.turnsBody: Play a card that matches the active color, number, or symbol. Wild cards can be played on any turn.
rules.modeRule: Current mode: Standard. Other modes are shown in room settings as coming soon.
rules.scoreRule: Score target: first player out wins the round, or 500 points ends the game when selected.
rules.lastStandOn: Last Stand is enabled: players finish in order, the first finisher wins, and the final remaining player loses.
rules.jumpInOn: Jump In is enabled: any player may play an exact matching card out of turn.
rules.jumpInOff: Jump In is disabled: only the active player may play cards.
rules.stackingOn: Stacking is enabled: +2 stacks on +2, and Wild +4 stacks only on Wild +4. The first player who cannot stack draws the total.
rules.stackingOff: Stacking is disabled: draw cards resolve immediately.
rules.deckBoxesRule: Each round starts with {count} card box(es). The minimum increases by one box per four player seats.
rules.actionSkip: Skip makes the next player lose a turn.
rules.actionReverse: Reverse changes direction. With two players, it acts like Skip.
rules.actionDraw2: Draw Two makes the next player draw two cards and lose a turn.
rules.actionWild: Wild lets you choose the active color.
rules.actionWild4: Wild Draw Four lets you choose a color and forces a challenge choice.
rules.oneBody: Press One when you have one card left. If you miss it, another player can catch you and you draw two cards.
